title: taraxacum selanderi
intro: Taraxacum selanderi, also known as the Swedish dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum selanderi include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and support liver function, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers and improve immune system function. Taraxacum selanderi can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
